description.ko: 첨단 기술의 경이로움과 거친 도시의 질감이 만나는 거대한 대도시의 숨막히는 전경입니다. 잠들지 않는 도시의 비에 젖은 거리에 수천 개의 네온 사인이 반사되며 도시 전체가 생동감 있게 빛납니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a sprawling metropolis where high-tech wonder meets urban grit. The city is alive with the glow of a thousand neon signs, reflecting off the rain-slicked streets of a world that never sleeps.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a futuristic cyberpunk megacity at night, heavy rain creating reflections on metallic surfaces and asphalt, towering skyscrapers adorned with massive 3D holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving through dense neon-lit canyons, vibrant cyan and magenta color palette, highly detailed urban architecture, synthwave aesthetic, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic.
